en.extract:
The Makira thrush (Zoothera margaretae), also known as the San Cristobal thrush, is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands.  Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Makira thrush''' ('''''Zoothera margaretae'''''), also known as the '''San Cristobal thrush''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Turdidae]]. It is [[endemic]] to the [[Solomon Islands]].  Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
